questionHtml: Compare and contrast the rank order of body mass and brain volume in the six species of mammals.
markschemeHtml:
similarity:

a. as body size increases, brain volume increases for smaller mammals
OR
«weak» positive correlation ✔

 

contrast:

b. humans do not fit the trend/are the exception ✔
